expectations.text: Template exposes --card-bg under the Cards section
expectations.evidence: Cards block lists `/* --card-bg: #ffffff;   card background color */`.

expectations.text: components.css defines --card-bg defaulting to var(--card), not a raw primitive
expectations.evidence: `--card-bg: var(--card);` in :root Card section; also wired --color-card-bg in @theme inline.

expectations.text: Template --card-bg example is a consumer hex, not oklch/var
expectations.evidence: example: #ffffff.

expectations.text: Pre-existing template tokens preserved (button-bg, badge-bg, radius, card-radius)
expectations.evidence: all four still present.

expectations.text: A @theme-template marker for --card-bg exists in components.css
expectations.evidence: marker block (group:fine-tuning, block:cards) sits directly above the --card-bg declaration; generator regenerated template.

expectations.text: Template no longer lists --badge-radius
expectations.evidence: badge-radius absent; Tags/badges block lists only --badge-bg/-fg.

expectations.text: --badge-radius knob removed from components.css
expectations.evidence: declaration + its marker deleted.

expectations.text: Other badge controls (--badge-bg, --badge-fg) still in template
expectations.evidence: both present.

expectations.text: Response surfaces that removal breaks client themes overriding --badge-radius
expectations.evidence: Report: existing `.theme-*` overriding --badge-radius will 'silently no-op'; flags tier-3 removal as a major-version contract break.

expectations.text: semantic.css --radius default is now 0.5rem
expectations.evidence: `--radius: 0.5rem;`.

expectations.text: Template --radius example reads 0.5rem (matches new default)
expectations.evidence: template example: 0.5rem.

expectations.text: Audit correctly identified the template --radius example was stale before fixing
expectations.evidence: Generator reported 'Example values to UPDATE: --radius 0.625rem -> 0.5rem'; updated marker example + regenerated; re-ran to confirm in sync.

expectations.text: No unrelated template tokens changed (primary, button-bg, card-radius intact)
expectations.evidence: primary #2563eb, button-bg #2563eb, card-radius 1rem; --input-radius example correctly left at 0.625rem (its own token).

expectations.text: Template exposes --card-bg under the Cards section
expectations.evidence: hand-added `/* --card-bg: #ffffff;   card background color */` under Cards.

expectations.text: components.css defines --card-bg defaulting to var(--card), not a raw primitive
expectations.evidence: `--card-bg: var(--card);` + --color-card-bg mapping.

expectations.text: Template --card-bg example is a consumer hex, not oklch/var
expectations.evidence: example: #ffffff.

expectations.text: Pre-existing template tokens preserved (button-bg, badge-bg, radius, card-radius)
expectations.evidence: all four still present.

expectations.text: A @theme-template marker for --card-bg exists in components.css
expectations.evidence: Pre-marker world: no marker system, so the template was hand-edited; future token changes won't auto-surface.

expectations.text: Template no longer lists --badge-radius
expectations.evidence: advertised line removed from Tags/badges section.

expectations.text: --badge-radius knob removed from components.css
expectations.evidence: declaration removed from :root.

expectations.text: Other badge controls (--badge-bg, --badge-fg) still in template
expectations.evidence: both present.

expectations.text: Response surfaces that removal breaks client themes overriding --badge-radius
expectations.evidence: Report: override 'becomes a dead no-op'; classic removed-token-no-ops; major-version change.

expectations.text: semantic.css --radius default is now 0.5rem
expectations.evidence: `--radius: 0.5rem;`.

expectations.text: Template --radius example reads 0.5rem (matches new default)
expectations.evidence: template example: 0.5rem.

expectations.text: Audit correctly identified the template --radius example was stale before fixing
expectations.evidence: Audit flagged the --radius line as DRIFT (claimed 0.625rem, now 0.5rem); fixed.

expectations.text: No unrelated template tokens changed (primary, button-bg, card-radius intact)
expectations.evidence: primary/button-bg/card-radius intact; HOWEVER also changed --input-radius example 0.625->0.5rem (debatable: that's a separate token, not derived from --radius).
